name: terraform-template
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-lfs python3 python3-venv && git lfs install && curl -fsSL https://mise.jdx.dev/install.sh | sh && echo 'eval "$(~/.local/bin/mise activate bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc && ~/.local/bin/mise trust /workspaces/terraform-template/mise.toml && ~/.local/bin/mise install && mkdir -p .terraform.d/plugin-cache
